title: phaseolus vulgaris var. nigerrimus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. nigerrimus, also known as the Black Jack bean, is a variety of the common bean (Phaseolus vulgaris) with a dark, almost black color. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Black Jack bean has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The bean can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
